# CWE-262 — Not Using Password Aging (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-262-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

// Vulnerable: authenticates without checking when the password was last rotated.
func PortalLogin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	user := r.FormValue("user")
	if user == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing user", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	var hash string
	var lastSeen time.Time
	_ = db.QueryRow("SELECT hash, last_seen FROM creds WHERE user = ?", user).Scan(&hash, &lastSeen)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
